2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.2.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3012.issue: [S3012] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is not defined. Consider adding it for automated releases.

3021.issue: [S3021] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 22. Consider updating to the recommended version 24.

3050.issue: [W3050] "test-and-release.yml": could not retrieve log for "check-and-lint" job in [run #359](https://github.com/CorantGmbH/ioBroker.air-q/actions/runs/23750210095).

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (src/main.ts). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "dns" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:dns" instead.

5047.issue: [W5047] "admin/style.css" is most likely outdated since jsonConfig is used. Please consider removing it.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>5 words). Affected languages: fr (1 key, example: c3h8_txt).

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#193] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/CorantGmbH/ioBroker.air-q/issues/193)

8005.issue: [W8005] Latest GitHub release tag (v1.2.1) does not match latest npm version (1.2.0).

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/CorantGmbH/ioBroker.air-q/blob/master/package.json)

0071.issue: [S0071] No devDependency for "@iobroker/eslint-config" found. Consider migrating to the shared ESLint config.

0073.issue: [S0073] "eslint":"^9.24.0" is >= 9.0.0 but "@iobroker/eslint-config" is not used. Consider migrating to "@iobroker/eslint-config".

0082.issue: [S0082] A newer version (8.0.2) for package "chai-as-promised" (devDependencies) exists. The newer version has been published for more than 300 days. Please evaluate if upgrading from 8.0.0 to 8.0.2 is possible.

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/CorantGmbH/ioBroker.air-q/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/CorantGmbH/ioBroker.air-q/blob/master/package.json)

0063.issue: [W0063] "@types/sinon-chai, sinon-chai" are included in "@iobroker/testing". Remove from devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/CorantGmbH/ioBroker.air-q/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/CorantGmbH/ioBroker.air-q/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
